title: oreinotinus ayavacensis
intro: Oreinotinus ayavacensis is a species of plant that belongs to the family of Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oreinotinus ayavacensis include its potential to treat various infections, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oreinotinus ayavacensis can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
